headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen battled past RB Leipzig 3-2 in an entertaining Bundesliga opener on Saturday to confirm their status as potential title contenders.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen edge past RB Leipzig in 3-2 thriller

video.headline: Florian Wirtz kisses Leverkusen's winning goal in off the crossbar

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Florian Wirtz kisses Leverkusen's 3rd goal in off the crossbar) 2023/08/19 ESHEET

headlines.description: Donyell Malen drilled in an 88th minute winner to hand Borussia Dortmund, last season's runner-up, a nervous 1-0 victory over visiting Cologne in their Bundesliga opener on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund grab last-gasp winner in B'liga opener

video.headline: Donyell Malen nets the winning goal for Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Donyell Malen nets the winning goal for Dortmund) 2023/08/19 ESHEET
